meta.title: Apostles' Creed
meta.tradition_notes: Ancient baptismal creed of the Western church, final form c. 700 AD.

provenance.notes: Proof texts from Creeds.json are already in OSIS format -- raw and osis fields are identical. Content used as canonical text; ContentWithProofs preserved as content_with_proofs.

units.content:
I believe in God, the Father almighty, creator of heaven and earth.

I believe in Jesus Christ, God's only Son, our Lord, who was conceived by the Holy Spirit, born of the Virgin Mary, suffered under Pontius Pilate, was crucified, died, and was buried; he descended to the dead. On the third day he rose again; he ascended into heaven, he is seated at the right hand of the Father, and he will come to judge the living and the dead.

I believe in the Holy Spirit, the holy catholic Church, the communion of saints, the forgiveness of sins, the resurrection of the body, and the life everlasting. Amen.
